case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. VENITTA LOGAN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOGAN, VENITTA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 143 MIDDLE POINT ROAD, S.F. CA., SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED MAY-24-2004, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LOGAN, VENITTA
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $4.40 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT LOGAN, VENITTA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LOGAN, VENITTA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LOGAN, VENITTA
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT LOGAN, VENITTA
